summary: Recent updates to the libwebrtc build have included changes to the `default_config_env` for version 150, which is part of the foundation for **WebRTC**, the technology that powers real-time audio and video communication in browsers. This adjustment helps streamline the building process and ensures compatibility with the latest enhancements in the WebRTC platform, ultimately aiming to improve performance and reliability in video calls and streaming services. While users may not see an immediate visual change, this work is essential for keeping Firefox equipped with the latest advancements in real-time communication technology.
